app.marketNote: Tech, clothing, and kitchen essentials in one place
app.techPanelSubtitle: Add phones, laptops, accessories, or kitchen devices to the catalog.
app.restaurantPanelSubtitle: Add a restaurant profile, then manage food items through the menu builder.
app.menuPanelSubtitle: Manage item name, category, price, halal status, and availability.
app.panelProductAdded: Tech listing was added to the catalog.
app.panelRestaurantAdded: Restaurant was added to the panel.
app.panelMenuAdded: Food item was added to the restaurant menu.
app.panelIdeaCategories: Categories: quick CRUD for phone/laptop/accessory with brand, condition, image, and contact.
app.panelIdeaMenu: Menu: category, price, halal/allergen flags, availability, and real-time updates.
app.panelIdeaOps: Ops: owner orders, stock, analytics, and promo blocks can be added next.
app.authCopy: Use your profile for orders, saved listings, seller chat, and delivery.
app.loginCopy: Sign in with email/password or with your phone number.
app.registerCopy: Confirm your email, password, and phone number with an SMS code.
app.welcomeBack: Returning user? Sign in with email or phone.
app.smsDemoCode: Demo code: 123456. Real SMS will be sent when the backend is connected.
app.phoneFormatHint: Enter a Korean phone number like 01012345678.
app.phoneCodeRequired: Verify the phone number with an SMS code.
app.wrongCode: The code is wrong. Demo code: 123456.
app.termsRequired: You must agree to the terms to sign up.
app.passwordHelp: Use at least 8 characters with letters and numbers.
app.terms: By continuing, you agree to JUTSU terms.
app.authDemo: Demo login for now. It will connect to real sessions when Django is ready.
app.authError: Enter a valid email/phone and password.
app.name: Name
app.apiSoon: Real payment connects when backend is ready
